title: Gale: Yellow Brick Road
overview: Dorothy Gale’s granddaughter Emily is tormented by visions, disjointed dreams, and an unshakable sense that reality itself is unraveling. As these disturbances mount, she's drawn toward a shadow world-a dark and magical realm that shouldn't exist. Through chilling encounters and surreal revelations, Emily stumbles into the long-buried legacy of Oz—now a place of ruin, tragedy, and unspeakable horrors.
